since_last: 36% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.06%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 36% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.57% · BTC -2.26% · Gold -1.72% · Nasdaq100 -0.30%. 36% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.06%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.06%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.49%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +10.79%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +10.79%, BIDU +5.50%, AVGO +4.83%, ANET +3.99%, SMCI +3.31%. Laggards: PLTR -4.63%, PANW -4.59%, UPST -4.05%, NOW -3.77%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.17% at $151.21
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.17% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
